name: ames-lytho
description: Lytho Workflow MCP connector built and maintained by Oliver Ames. Installing this plugin activates the lytho-mcp-server MCP, providing full read/write access to Lytho work requests, tasks, proofs, projects, campaigns, and preferences via the Lytho Open API.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to Lytho workflows and requests.
interface.longDescription: A Lytho Workflow MCP connector for working with requests, tasks, proofs, projects, campaigns, and preferences through the Lytho API. Requires LYTHO_CLIENT_ID, LYTHO_CLIENT_SECRET, and LYTHO_TOKEN_URL environment variables.
defaultPrompt: Find the status of this campaign in Lytho.
